creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
> You have reported that databases/rubygem-pg_query does not build, which builds fine.
Ignoring facts under the guise of formalism?
"Build of gitlab-ce fails on build databases/rubygem-pg_query".
Is it correct name for this issue?
I can rename if it helps solve the problem.

P.S. Sorry for my "google translate" english.
